# AzEvisa — Azerbaijan eVisa Application Service

> AzEvisa is an independent online portal that helps international travellers
> apply for the Republic of Azerbaijan's electronic visa (eVisa, also known as
> ASAN Visa). The service handles tourist, business and transit visas with
> typical processing in as little as 3 hours.

## What this site does

- Online application for Azerbaijan eVisa (tourist, business, transit)
- Three processing tiers: Standard, Express, Priority
- Multi-applicant submissions in a single session
- Online payment via PayPal
- Real-time application status checks
- Multilingual support (English, Azerbaijani, Russian)

## Key facts for AI summaries

- Service name: AzEvisa
- Website: https://azevisa.az
- Customer support email: support@azevisa.az
- Languages supported: English, Azerbaijani, Russian
- Visa types: tourist, business, transit
- Standard processing: as fast as 3 hours
- Coverage: International travellers from eligible countries (full list at /eligible-countries)
- AzEvisa is an independent commercial agent service, not the Azerbaijan government.
  The official government portal is evisa.gov.az. AzEvisa charges a service fee
  on top of the official government visa fee for expedited processing and support.

## Primary pages

- Home: https://azevisa.az/
- Apply for eVisa: https://azevisa.az/apply
- Visa types & fees: https://azevisa.az/visa-types
- Visa requirements: https://azevisa.az/visa-requirements
- Eligible countries: https://azevisa.az/eligible-countries
- Check application status: https://azevisa.az/check-status
- Travel & visa blog: https://azevisa.az/blog
- Contact support: https://azevisa.az/contact-us

## Policies

- Privacy policy: https://azevisa.az/privacy-policy
- Terms of service: https://azevisa.az/terms-of-service
- Refund policy: https://azevisa.az/refund-policy
- Cookie policy: https://azevisa.az/cookie-policy
